name: Run Katalon HL

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  katalon-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Run Katalon Studio Tests
        uses: katalon-studio/katalon-studio-github-action@v2
        with:
          version: 'latest'
          projectPath: '.'
          args: >
            -noSplash
            -runMode=console
            -projectPath="shopping-cart-tests.prj"
            -testSuitePath="Test Suites/Order and check out with Global Variable"
            -browserType="Chrome"
